value: I don't have access to real-time information about today's updates, but I'd be happy to help you check. You can see the latest Lightroom Classic updates by going to Help > Updates in the application itself, or by visiting Adobe's release notes page for Lightroom Classic. If you're experiencing a specific issue after an update or want to know about a particular feature change, please let me know and I can help troubleshoot or explain what's new.
